name: MusicFlow — Ad-Free Player
description: Spotify-like music player powered by YouTube. No ads, no login needed.

content_security_policy.extension_pages: default-src 'self'; script-src 'self'; connect-src https://www.googleapis.com http://127.0.0.1:7842 https://*.googlevideo.com https://api.lyrics.ovh; media-src https://*.googlevideo.com blob:; img-src 'self' https: data:; style-src 'self' 'unsafe-inline'
